title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Kale Consultants

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Kale Consultants
jsonLd.description:
Join the Kale Consultants family as a Frontend Developer in Nagpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Kale Consultants:
Kale Consultants is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kale Consultants!
